name: DEFECT/DAMAGED PACKAGE-CLEARANCE: Reflex Kitten Food Chicken & Rice 15kg
shortDescription: Nourish your kitten’s early development with Reflex Kitten Chicken a high-quality formula rich in protein, vitamins, and minerals for healthy growth and lasting vitality.
description: Reflex Kitten Food Chicken & Rice 15kg is a superior quality, complete, and balanced formula designed to give kittens the best possible start in life. Combining the goodness of premium chicken protein and easily digestible rice , this diet supports steady growth, immune strength, and long-term vitality . Created by nutrition experts, Reflex Kitten ensures your young cat receives all essential nutrients for healthy bones, strong muscles, and a glossy coat . The 15kg bulk pack offers exceptional value for breeders or multi-cat homes, providing consistent, high-quality feeding over time. Nutritional Highlights Protein Power for Growth Real chicken provides a rich source of highly digestible protein , giving your kitten the amino acids it needs for muscle development, tissue repair, and bone formation during its growing months. Essential Fats for Energy and Skin Health With a 20% crude fat content , this food delivers balanced energy while nourishing your kitten’s skin and coat , keeping it soft, shiny, and healthy. Omega Fatty Acids for Brain and Immune Function Formulated with flaxseed , Reflex Kitten supplies natural omega 3 and 6 fatty acids to promote mental sharpness , immunity , and healthy fur growth . Immune Defence Support Ingredients such as beta-glucans, CitriStim, and whey work together to enhance your kitten’s immune system, helping it stay strong and resistant to illness. Digestive Support and Odour Reduction The addition of mannan oligosaccharides (MOS) and yucca extract supports gut health , enhances nutrient absorption, and minimizes unpleasant litter box odours for a cleaner home. Vitamin and Mineral Balance Packed with vital vitamins ( A, D, E, K, C, and B-group ) and minerals ( calcium, zinc, phosphorus, selenium, iron ), Reflex Kitten supports bone density, metabolic function, and overall body balance . Ingredients Processed animal protein, rice, wheat, corn, corn gluten, animal fat, liver flavour, flaxseed, brewer’s yeast, taurine, MOS (mannan oligosaccharides), beta-glucan, yucca, quillaja extract, and enriched vitamins and minerals. Each ingredient is carefully chosen to deliver high digestibility, consistent nutrition , and a taste kittens love . Feeding Guidelines Feed Reflex Kitten Chicken & Rice according to your kitten’s age, weight, and activity level . Adjust daily portions based on appetite and growth progress. Provide fresh water at all times. Store the food in a cool, dry place , away from direct sunlight. These practices help maintain optimal health, digestion, and body weight as your kitten grows. Why Pet Parents Choose Reflex Kitten Chicken & Rice 15kg . Complete and balanced nutrition for healthy growth . Premium chicken protein for strong muscles and bones . Promotes immunity, shiny coat, and digestive comfort .Fortified with essential vitamins and minerals .Cost-effective 15kg pack ideal for multiple kittens
